configured.label: AI: multi-provider fallback chain
configured.detail: Fallback loop with failure tracking confirmed

configured.label: AI: credit accounting (creditEngine + usageMetering)
configured.detail: Both services present — PROVIDER_COSTS table with per-provider USD rates

configured.label: OAuth: CSRF protection (state + nonce)
configured.detail: State nonce with 5-min TTL — CSRF protected

missing.label: Email provider: none
missing.fix: Set one of: RESEND_API_KEY, SENDGRID_API_KEY, POSTMARK_API_KEY, SMTP_HOST+USER+PASS, or AWS SES vars

missing.label: OAuth: JWT_SECRET (token encryption)
missing.detail: JWT_SECRET missing — OAuth token storage will fail

missing.label: Google OAuth: credentials
missing.fix: Register app and set GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID + GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET in .env

missing.label: Microsoft OAuth: credentials
missing.fix: Register app and set MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID + MICROSOFT_CLIENT_SECRET in .env

missing.label: LinkedIn OAuth: credentials
missing.fix: Register app and set LINKEDIN_CLIENT_ID + LINKEDIN_CLIENT_SECRET in .env

missing.label: Sentry: SENTRY_DSN
missing.fix: Create project at sentry.io → Settings → Client Keys → DSN

missing.label: Sentry: event delivery
missing.fix: Set SENTRY_DSN to enable crash reporting

missing.label: Cloudflare R2: credentials
missing.fix: Set R2 vars in .env (Cloudflare Dashboard → R2 → Manage API tokens)

warnings.label: Sentry: SENTRY_RELEASE
warnings.detail: Not set — release tracking won't correlate errors to versions
warnings.fix: Set SENTRY_RELEASE=v1.0.0 in .env (or inject from CI)

warnings.label: Sentry: SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN (for release API)
warnings.detail: Not set — createRelease() will not work
warnings.fix: Set SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN from sentry.io → User Settings → API Tokens

email.label: Email provider: none
email.fix: Set one of: RESEND_API_KEY, SENDGRID_API_KEY, POSTMARK_API_KEY, SMTP_HOST+USER+PASS, or AWS SES vars
